Our people

Our People

Meet the legal minds behind Vedadi Legal's global reputation

Arjun Vedadi

Senior Partner | Corporate Law

Arjun founded Vedadi Legal with a vision to redefine international legal advisory. With 20+ years of experience across Asia, Europe, and the Americas, he specializes in complex cross-border corporate transactions.

View Full Profile →

Priya Sharma

Partner | Dispute Resolution

Priya brings 15 years of litigation experience across international arbitration forums including ICC, LCIA, and SIAC. She has represented Fortune 500 companies in high-stakes disputes.

View Full Profile →

Marcus Klein

Partner | International Trade

Marcus advises multinational corporations on trade compliance, sanctions, and regulatory matters across EU and US jurisdictions.

View Full Profile →

Aisha Noor

Associate | Intellectual Property

Aisha specializes in IP strategy for technology and pharmaceutical companies, with expertise in patent prosecution and licensing.

View Full Profile →

David Chen

Associate | M&A

David has advised on over $2B worth of M&A transactions across Southeast Asia and the Middle East.

View Full Profile →

Sofia Rossi

Senior Advisor | Private Advisory

Sofia advises ultra-high-net-worth families on wealth structuring, trust formation, and succession planning across European jurisdictions.

View Full Profile →
